_comment_usage: AUTO-HIGH-TRUST permission profile. Copy to %USERPROFILE%\OpenCodeLIG_USERDATA\opencode_config\opencode.json and merge with your real 'provider' block (LIG OpenAI-compatible endpoint). Safe work runs without prompts; destructive/outbound actions are denied or asked. Explicit 'deny' is always enforced even under `opencode --auto`.
_comment_write: Per OpenCode docs the 'write' and 'apply_patch' tools are governed by the 'edit' permission; setting 'edit' to allow lets the agent create/modify project files silently.
